ham.subject: Out of Office: Jane Doe - 6/1-6/10
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I’ll be out of the office on vacation from Monday, June 1 through Friday, June 10. I will have limited access to email during this period and will respond to your message when I return on June 11.

If you need immediate assistance, please contact John Smith (john.smith@example.com) or the office at (555) 123-4567.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,
Jane Doe
Senior Analyst

spam.subject: Urgent: Your Scholarship Award Requires Immediate Action
spam.body:
Dear Student,

Congratulations! You have been selected as a recipient of the XYZ University Excellence Scholarship for the 2024‑2025 academic year. This award is awarded to a limited number of students based on your academic merit and financial need.

To claim and activate your scholarship, please complete the verification process within 48 hours by clicking the link below and providing your personal details and bank account information:

<URL>

Failure to complete the verification within the deadline will result in forfeiture of the scholarship. Please note that the scholarship funds are disbursed directly to your bank account upon verification. The process is secure and managed by the Office of the Registrar.

If you have any questions, contact the Scholarship Office at scholarships@xyzuniversity.edu or call (555) 987‑6543.

We look forward to welcoming you to XYZ University.

Sincerely,
Dr. Emily Carter
Director of Scholarships
XYZ University
